description:
Offered: two-year cycle with LATN 1000, 1100, and 2000
This course is the second part of the intermediate Latin sequence and the culmination of the training in the vocabulary, grammar and syntax necessary for reading the Latin language offered in LATN 1000 through LATN 2000 . In this course, students read an actual work in Latin by an ancient Roman author.
Note: Students with more than 2-years of high school Latin may enroll in this course with permission of the instructor.
